steps.t: The mine can be found in Tingobel in north-eastern Blackroot Vale, to the north of Lancrath. Gúrion has asked you to search the Tingobel mine for sign…
The Dead can be found in the deepest reaches of the Tingobel mine. You have found a cold fire-pit in the depths of the Tingobel mine. Perhaps lighting…
Gúrion can be found along the northernmost roadway of Lancrath in south-eastern Blackroot Vale. You have temporarily quieted the Dead in the Tingobel …
